case_title: ROY LUI VS. ALI MOINI ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER; DECLARATORY RELIFE AND FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIFE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUI, ROY DBA SUGOI SUSHI
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-01-2018 CONTINUED TO SEP-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-23-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST EMMANUEL ENYINWA, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-23-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-09-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-09-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100042428)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-12-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST EMMANUEL ENYINWA, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-29-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-14-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

WRONGFUL EVICTION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUI, ROY DBA SUGOI SUSHI AS TO DEFENDANT MOINI, ALI DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-01-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-30-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-09-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
